name: Raccoon Retail
description: Oopsy! Clumsy customers are making a big mess and its your job to keep the supermarket clean. Drive around, collect trash and empty it in the dumpster. The faster you clean to more money you earn. Upgrade your retail store to increase your revenue.
instructions: Drive around with WASD or arrow keys You can switch the view by clicking the camera icon in the top
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, Animal, Arcade, Business, Cartoon, Casual, Cleaning, Driving, Funny, Hypercasual, Management, Mobile, Racing, Relaxation, Restaurant, Slither
